description.value:
Beginning at level 3, you begin to understand how to use your unique gifts in combat to your advantage.
You select one of the following techniques, you gain an additional technique at 7th. and 11th. level:

  • Pounce:
    As an action, you can leap up to half your movement speed in any direction (this does not consume your movement).
    If you have at least 15 ft. of head start in a straight line, you can leap up to your full movement speed instead.
    To use this technique, a creature must be within your pouncing range, as you aim to jump onto them.
    The target must make a Strength saving throw against your Taijutsu Save DC.
    On a failure, the target is knocked prone, and you can make a single claw attack against them with advantage (Properties like multiattack or light do not apply to this specific attack).
    Regardless of success or failure, you leap off the target and land in the nearest free space within 5 ft.
    If you are hidden from the target they have disadvantage on the saving throw.

  • Cat Reflexes:
    As a reaction, you can channel reflexes akin to a cat, capable of freezing in place or darting away in an instant.
    When you activate Cat Reflexes, you gain +2 to AC and +1d4 to all Physical saving throws until the start of your next turn.

  • Lick Wounds:
    You can lick yourself or your allies using chakra-enhanced saliva to heal wounds.
    You may lick a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus, and they cannot benefit from this feature again until they complete a long rest. The saliva's effects last for 8 hours.
    Any creature you lick gains 2d8 temporary hit points and reduces the rank of burned, corroded, poisoned, bleeding, or lacerated conditions by 2, if applicable.
    You may lick one creature as an action or multiple creatures during the duration of a short rest.
